title: 10 best herbal creams for tonsillitis
description: St John's wort creams helps with tonsillitis because they contain hyperforin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound that soothes and calms the inflamed tissues in the throat. The cream also contains antioxidants that help to reduce swelling and prevent further irritation. Additionally, St John's wort has natural antibacterial properties that can help to combat bacterial infections that may be contributing to tonsillitis.
